arts.ttl: Tottenham's longest serving player to extend deal and take stint to 12 years
arts.sum: Ben Davies has been at Tottenham since 2014 but the Welsh defender is set to have his contract clause triggered which will keep him in north London for another year

arts.ttl: ‘The indication is’: Alasdair Gold says Tottenham could change their January transfer plans now
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur can seemingly never have a straightforward week. Spurs just picked up one of their greatest ever Premier League results after beating Manchester City...

arts.ttl: Udogie reveals Tottenham’s main issue before meeting Roma
arts.sum: Italy international Destiny Udogie admits Tottenham have lacked consistency this season, but Spurs ‘will try...

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Former Tottenham coach branded new Jose Mourinho ready for Steven Gerrard clash
arts.sum: TBR Football has spoken exclusively to former US boss Anthony Hudson

arts.ttl: Four goalkeepers appear in Tottenham training today including 19-year-old youngster after Vicario injury
Ange Postecoglou rules out Tottenham transfer - 'We have to deal with this shock'
arts.sum: Injury to goalkeeper Guglielmo Vicario will not change transfer strategy and Tottenham boss Ange Postecoglou is confident that veteran Fraser Forster can do a fine job as deputy

No surprises that the first topic was Ange's reaction to the news that Guglielmo Vicario had fractured his ankle 30 minutes into our 4-0 win at City on Saturday - and that he'd completed the match... Vicario is probably a hero to Tottenham fans for playing through that injury?

arts.ttl: De Rossi explains why it’s wrong to ‘imitate Guardiola’
arts.sum: Former Roma midfielder and boss Daniele De Rossi insists football coaches should not imitate Pep...

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Roma predictions: Johnson can stay on the scoring trail
arts.sum: Tottenham take on Roma at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium in the Europa League on Thursday and Dan Childs fancies their Welsh winger, Brennan Johnson, to get himself on the scoresheet.

arts.ttl: Every word Ange Postecoglou said on Guglielmo Vicario injury, free agent move and January transfer
arts.sum: Spurs host the Italian side, now managed by Claudio Ranieri, at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium on Thursday night, knowing a win would put them in a strong position in the big Europa League table with four victories from their first five matches of the eight they will play at this stage. Tottenham will go into the game without one of their own Italians after goalkeeper Guglielmo Vicario fractured his ankle in the 4-0 win at Manchester City on Saturday.
